name: Greatsword
description: A heavy blade, the reach of razor iron. Cleaves, does not prick.

name: Longsword
description: A soldier's blade. Balanced, proven, nothing more.

name: Battleaxe
description: Cuts wood or bone the same way.

name: Greataxe
description: Built for the felling of things larger than men.

name: Warhammer
description: Cracks plate. Breaks bone. A slow, certain weapon.

name: Mace
description: Iron-headed and blessed. For those who must break what should not be broken.

name: Rapier
description: A duelist's blade. Thrust once, and the fight is over.

name: Shortsword
description: Close, quick, discreet. The weapon of narrow places.

name: Dagger
description: Slender. Easily hidden. Often forgotten until it is too late.

name: Quarterstaff
description: Iron-shod wood, carved with a thousand small sigils. A scholar's weapon, when words fail.

name: Longbow
description: Yew and sinew, drawn to the ear. Distance is a mercy both ways.

name: Shortbow
description: Faster to draw than the longbow, and just as honest.

name: Natural Claws
description: What you were born with. Sharper than it should be.

name: Flamebrand
description: A blade quenched in pyre-ash. The runes along the fuller still hold their warmth. Strikes carry a remembered fire.

name: Vampiric Dagger
description: Black iron, thin and thirsty. A hairline groove drinks what the edge takes. The wielder feels warmer with every wound given.

name: Stormpiercer
description: A duelist's rapier of cold pale steel. The point seems to find the gap before the hand decides where to send it.

name: Blackthorn
description: A dagger of darkwood and bone, edged with thorns soaked in marsh-poison. The cuts are small. They do not stay small.

name: Glasscutter
description: A blade so thin it barely casts a shadow. A miss is nothing. A hit is everything. The smith made one — only one.

name: Whisper-Edge
description: Forged in a place the sun does not reach. The cut precedes the swing. What it takes is not flesh, but the shape of it.

name: Sun-Forged Hammer
description: A mace whose head was struck on an anvil set in the dawn-fires. It hates the dark, and the dark remembers it.

name: Marauder's Greataxe
description: Pitted iron, notched like a saw. Made for a bandit who took what he wanted and missed often, but seldom missed twice.
